rows.original_question: Em Palmas/TO, qual é, por distrito, a área total (em km²) formada pela interseção entre o distrito e as zonas de influência de 300 m ao redor das escolas com internet e banda larga? Traga também o percentual dessa área em relação à área do distrito.
rows.original_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT m.cd_mun, m.geometry
  FROM municipio m
  JOIN unidade_federativa uf ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE m.nm_mun = 'Palmas' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'TO'
),
dist AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist, d.nm_dist, d.cd_mun, d.geometry AS geom_dist, ST_Area(d.geometry::geography)/1e6 AS area_dist_km2
  FROM distrito d
  JOIN muni ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
escolas_buf AS (
  SELECT e.cd_mun, ST_Buffer(e.geometry::geography, 300)::geometry AS geom_buf
  FROM escola e
  JOIN muni ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
  JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  WHERE COALESCE(meb.in_internet,0)=1 AND COALESCE(meb.in_banda_larga,0)=1
),
intersec AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    ST_Union(ST_Intersection(d.geom_dist, b.geom_buf)) AS geom_inter
  FROM dist d
  JOIN escolas_buf b ON b.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  WHERE ST_Intersects(d.geom_dist, b.geom_buf)
  GROUP BY d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  ROUND(CAST(ST_Area(i.geom_inter::geography)/1e6 AS numeric),4) AS area_intersec_km2,
  ROUND(CAST(100.0 * ST_Area(i.geom_inter::geography)/NULLIF(d.area_dist_km2*1e6,0) AS numeric),2) AS perc_do_distrito
FROM dist d
JOIN intersec i ON i.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
ORDER BY area_intersec_km2 DESC, distrito;
rows.changed_question: Em Palmas/RJ, qual é, por distrito, a área total (em km²) resultante da diferença entre o distrito e as zonas de influência de 713 m ao redor das escolas que possuem impressora multifuncional e internet para a comunidade? Traga também o percentual dessa área em relação à área total do distrito.
rows.changed_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT
    m.cd_mun,
    m.geometry
  FROM municipio AS m
  JOIN unidade_federativa AS uf
    ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE
    m.nm_mun = 'Palmas' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'RJ'
), dist AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    d.nm_dist,
    d.cd_mun,
    d.geometry AS geom_dist,
    ST_AREA(CAST(d.geometry AS GEOGRAPHY)) / 1e6 AS area_dist_km2
  FROM distrito AS d
  JOIN muni
    ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), escolas_buf AS (
  SELECT
    e.cd_mun,
    CAST(ST_BUFFER(CAST(e.geometry AS GEOGRAPHY), 713) AS GEOMETRY) AS geom_buf
  FROM escola AS e
  JOIN muni
    ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
  JOIN microdados_ed_basica AS meb
    ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  WHERE
    COALESCE(meb.in_equip_impressora_mult, 0) = 1
    AND COALESCE(meb.in_internet_comunidade, 0) = 1
), intersec AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    ST_UNION(ST_DIFFERENCE(d.geom_dist, b.geom_buf)) AS geom_inter
  FROM dist AS d
  JOIN escolas_buf AS b
    ON b.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  WHERE
    ST_INTERSECTS(d.geom_dist, b.geom_buf)
  GROUP BY
    d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  ROUND(CAST(ST_AREA(CAST(i.geom_inter AS GEOGRAPHY)) / 1e6 AS DECIMAL), 4) AS area_intersec_km2,
  ROUND(
    CAST(100.0 * ST_AREA(CAST(i.geom_inter AS GEOGRAPHY)) / NULLIF(d.area_dist_km2 * 1e6, 0) AS DECIMAL),
    2
  ) AS perc_do_distrito
FROM dist AS d
JOIN intersec AS i
  ON i.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
ORDER BY
  area_intersec_km2 DESC,
  distrito

rows.original_question: Em Londrina/PR, por distrito, quantas escolas que funcionam no período noturno ficam a até 800 m de um CRAS quando consideramos apenas a área de interseção entre distrito e um buffer de 100 m do seu contorno? Informe também a distância média dessas escolas até o centróide do distrito.
rows.original_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT m.cd_mun, m.geometry
  FROM municipio m
  INNER JOIN unidade_federativa uf ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE m.nm_mun = 'Londrina' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'PR'
),
dist AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist, d.nm_dist, d.cd_mun,
         d.geometry AS geom_dist,
         ST_Centroid(d.geometry) AS centroide,
         ST_Buffer(ST_Boundary(d.geometry)::geography, 100)::geometry AS cinta_100m
  FROM distrito d
  INNER JOIN muni ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
zona_analise AS (
  SELECT cd_dist, ST_Intersection(geom_dist, cinta_100m) AS geom_zona
  FROM dist
),
esc AS (
  SELECT e.cd_entidade, e.cd_mun, e.geometry
  FROM escola e
  INNER JOIN muni ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
  INNER JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  WHERE COALESCE(meb.in_noturno,0)=1
),
agg AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (
      WHERE ST_Intersects(e.geometry, z.geom_zona)
        AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1 FROM cras c
          WHERE c.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
            AND ST_Intersects(c.geometry, d.geom_dist)
            AND ST_DWithin(e.geometry, c.geometry, 800)
        )
    ) AS qt_escolas_criterio,
    AVG(ST_Distance(e.geometry, d.centroide)) FILTER (WHERE ST_Intersects(e.geometry, z.geom_zona)) AS dist_media_centroide_m
  FROM dist d
  RIGHT JOIN zona_analise z ON z.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
  RIGHT JOIN esc e ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  GROUP BY d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  COALESCE(a.qt_escolas_criterio,0) AS qt_escolas_criterio,
  ROUND(CAST(a.dist_media_centroide_m AS numeric),2) AS dist_media_centroide_m
FROM dist d
RIGHT JOIN agg a ON a.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
ORDER BY qt_escolas_criterio DESC, dist_media_centroide_m ASC NULLS LAST, distrito;
rows.changed_question: Em Londrina/PI, por distrito, quantas escolas que oferecem EJA no ensino fundamental ficam a até 235 m de um CRAS quando consideramos apenas a área da diferença entre o distrito e um buffer de 270 m do seu contorno? Informe também a maior distância dessas escolas até o centróide do distrito.
rows.changed_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT
    m.cd_mun,
    m.geometry
  FROM municipio AS m
  INNER JOIN unidade_federativa AS uf
    ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE
    m.nm_mun = 'Londrina' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'PI'
), dist AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    d.nm_dist,
    d.cd_mun,
    d.geometry AS geom_dist,
    ST_CENTROID(d.geometry) AS centroide,
    CAST(ST_BUFFER(CAST(ST_BOUNDARY(d.geometry) AS GEOGRAPHY), 270) AS GEOMETRY) AS cinta_100m
  FROM distrito AS d
  INNER JOIN muni
    ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), zona_analise AS (
  SELECT
    cd_dist,
    ST_DIFFERENCE(geom_dist, cinta_100m) AS geom_zona
  FROM dist
), esc AS (
  SELECT
    e.cd_entidade,
    e.cd_mun,
    e.geometry
  FROM escola AS e
  INNER JOIN muni
    ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
  INNER JOIN microdados_ed_basica AS meb
    ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  WHERE
    COALESCE(meb.in_eja_fund, 0) = 1
), agg AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE
      ST_INTERSECTS(e.geometry, z.geom_zona)
      AND EXISTS(
        SELECT
          1
        FROM cras AS c
        WHERE
          c.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
          AND ST_INTERSECTS(c.geometry, d.geom_dist)
          AND ST_DWITHIN(e.geometry, c.geometry, 235)
      )) AS qt_escolas_criterio,
    MAX(ST_DISTANCE(e.geometry, d.centroide)) FILTER(WHERE
      ST_INTERSECTS(e.geometry, z.geom_zona)) AS dist_media_centroide_m
  FROM dist AS d
  RIGHT JOIN zona_analise AS z
    ON z.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
  RIGHT JOIN esc AS e
    ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  GROUP BY
    d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  COALESCE(a.qt_escolas_criterio, 0) AS qt_escolas_criterio,
  ROUND(CAST(a.dist_media_centroide_m AS DECIMAL), 2) AS dist_media_centroide_m
FROM dist AS d
RIGHT JOIN agg AS a
  ON a.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
ORDER BY
  qt_escolas_criterio DESC,
  dist_media_centroide_m ASC,
  distrito

rows.original_question: Em Uberlândia/MG, por distrito, qual é a escola com maior total de matrículas no fundamental + médio dentre as que estão na interseção entre o distrito e um buffer de 200 m aplicado às próprias escolas; e qual a distância dessa escola até a biblioteca mais próxima contida no mesmo distrito?
rows.original_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT m.cd_mun
  FROM municipio m
  INNER JOIN unidade_federativa uf ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE m.nm_mun = 'Uberlândia' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'MG'
),
distritos AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist, d.nm_dist, d.cd_mun, d.geometry AS geom_dist
  FROM distrito d
  INNER JOIN muni ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
escolas_mat AS (
  SELECT
    e.cd_entidade, e.cd_mun, e.geometry,
    COALESCE(meb.qt_mat_fund,0) + COALESCE(meb.qt_mat_med,0) AS tot_mat,
    ST_Buffer(e.geometry::geography, 200)::geometry AS buf200
  FROM escola e
  INNER JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  INNER JOIN muni ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
cand AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    em.cd_entidade,
    em.tot_mat,
    ST_Intersection(d.geom_dist, em.buf200) AS geom_int
  FROM distritos d
  JOIN escolas_mat em ON em.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  WHERE ST_Intersects(d.geom_dist, em.buf200)
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT
    cd_dist, cd_entidade, tot_mat,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cd_dist ORDER BY tot_mat DESC NULLS LAST) AS rn
  FROM cand
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  e.nm_entidade AS escola_top,
  r.tot_mat,
  ROUND(CAST(
    (SELECT MIN(ST_Distance(e.geometry, b.geometry))
     FROM biblioteca b
     WHERE b.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
       AND ST_Contains(d.geom_dist, b.geometry))
  AS numeric),2) AS dist_biblioteca_mais_proxima_m
FROM distritos d
INNER JOIN ranked r ON r.cd_dist = d.cd_dist AND r.rn = 1
INNER JOIN escola e ON e.cd_entidade = r.cd_entidade
ORDER BY tot_mat DESC, distrito;
rows.changed_question: Em Uberlândia/MT, por distrito, qual é a escola que possui o maior total de matrículas (soma de qt_mat_med_prop_3 e qt_mat_fund_af_6) entre as que estão na união entre o distrito e um buffer de 2 540 m aplicado às próprias escolas; e qual a distância **máxima** dessa escola até a biblioteca mais distante que esteja contida no mesmo distrito?
rows.changed_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT
    m.cd_mun
  FROM municipio AS m
  INNER JOIN unidade_federativa AS uf
    ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE
    m.nm_mun = 'Uberlândia' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'MT'
), distritos AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    d.nm_dist,
    d.cd_mun,
    d.geometry AS geom_dist
  FROM distrito AS d
  INNER JOIN muni
    ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), escolas_mat AS (
  SELECT
    e.cd_entidade,
    e.cd_mun,
    e.geometry,
    COALESCE(meb.qt_mat_med_prop_3, 0) + COALESCE(meb.qt_mat_fund_af_6, 0) AS tot_mat,
    CAST(ST_BUFFER(CAST(e.geometry AS GEOGRAPHY), 2540) AS GEOMETRY) AS buf200
  FROM escola AS e
  INNER JOIN microdados_ed_basica AS meb
    ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  INNER JOIN muni
    ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), cand AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    em.cd_entidade,
    em.tot_mat,
    ST_UNION(d.geom_dist, em.buf200) AS geom_int
  FROM distritos AS d
  JOIN escolas_mat AS em
    ON em.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  WHERE
    ST_INTERSECTS(d.geom_dist, em.buf200)
), ranked AS (
  SELECT
    cd_dist,
    cd_entidade,
    tot_mat,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cd_dist ORDER BY tot_mat DESC NULLS LAST) AS rn
  FROM cand
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  e.nm_entidade AS escola_top,
  r.tot_mat,
  ROUND(
    CAST((
      SELECT
        MAX(ST_DISTANCE(e.geometry, b.geometry))
      FROM biblioteca AS b
      WHERE
        b.cd_mun = d.cd_mun AND ST_CONTAINS(d.geom_dist, b.geometry)
    ) AS DECIMAL),
    2
  ) AS dist_biblioteca_mais_proxima_m
FROM distritos AS d
INNER JOIN ranked AS r
  ON r.cd_dist = d.cd_dist AND r.rn = 1
INNER JOIN escola AS e
  ON e.cd_entidade = r.cd_entidade
ORDER BY
  tot_mat DESC,
  distrito

changed_components.original: round(cast((select min(st_distance(e.geometry, b.geometry)) from biblioteca as b where b.cd_mun = d.cd_mun and st_contains(d.geom_dist, b.geometry)) as decimal), 2) as dist_biblioteca_mais_proxima_m

rows.original_question: Em Macapá/AP, por distrito, qual a diferença entre: (a) o número de bibliotecas que intersectam o distrito e (b) o número de escolas com laboratório de informática que intersectam o distrito; e qual a participação percentual de cada distrito no total dessa diferença no município?
rows.original_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT m.cd_mun
  FROM municipio m
  JOIN unidade_federativa uf ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE m.nm_mun = 'Macapá' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'AP'
),
distritos AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist, d.nm_dist, d.cd_mun, d.geometry AS geom_dist
  FROM distrito d
  JOIN muni ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
bib AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist, COUNT(*) AS qt_bib
  FROM distritos d
  JOIN biblioteca b ON b.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  WHERE ST_Intersects(b.geometry, d.geom_dist)
  GROUP BY d.cd_dist
),
esc_lab AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist, COUNT(*) AS qt_escolas_lab
  FROM distritos d
  JOIN escola e ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  WHERE ST_Intersects(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)
    AND COALESCE(meb.in_laboratorio_informatica,0)=1
  GROUP BY d.cd_dist
),
cmp AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(b.cd_dist, e.cd_dist) AS cd_dist,
    COALESCE(b.qt_bib,0) AS qt_bib,
    COALESCE(e.qt_escolas_lab,0) AS qt_escolas_lab
  FROM bib b
  FULL OUTER JOIN esc_lab e ON e.cd_dist = b.cd_dist
),
fin AS (
  SELECT
    d.nm_dist AS distrito,
    c.qt_bib,
    c.qt_escolas_lab,
    (c.qt_bib - c.qt_escolas_lab) AS diferenca
  FROM distritos d
  JOIN cmp c ON c.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  distrito,
  qt_bib,
  qt_escolas_lab,
  diferenca,
  ROUND(CAST(100.0 * diferenca / NULLIF(SUM(diferenca) OVER (),0) AS numeric),2) AS participacao_perc
FROM fin
ORDER BY diferenca DESC, distrito;
rows.changed_question: Em Macapá/BA, por distrito, qual a diferença entre (a) o número de bibliotecas que intersectam o distrito e (b) o número de escolas com área de plantio que intersectam o distrito; e qual a participação percentual de cada distrito em relação à média dessa diferença no município?
rows.changed_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT
    m.cd_mun
  FROM municipio AS m
  JOIN unidade_federativa AS uf
    ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE
    m.nm_mun = 'Macapá' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'BA'
), distritos AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    d.nm_dist,
    d.cd_mun,
    d.geometry AS geom_dist
  FROM distrito AS d
  JOIN muni
    ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), bib AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    COUNT(*) AS qt_bib
  FROM distritos AS d
  JOIN biblioteca AS b
    ON b.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  WHERE
    ST_INTERSECTS(b.geometry, d.geom_dist)
  GROUP BY
    d.cd_dist
), esc_lab AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    COUNT(*) AS qt_escolas_lab
  FROM distritos AS d
  JOIN escola AS e
    ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  JOIN microdados_ed_basica AS meb
    ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  WHERE
    ST_INTERSECTS(e.geometry, d.geom_dist) AND COALESCE(meb.in_area_plantio, 0) = 1
  GROUP BY
    d.cd_dist
), cmp AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(b.cd_dist, e.cd_dist) AS cd_dist,
    COALESCE(b.qt_bib, 0) AS qt_bib,
    COALESCE(e.qt_escolas_lab, 0) AS qt_escolas_lab
  FROM bib AS b
  FULL OUTER JOIN esc_lab AS e
    ON e.cd_dist = b.cd_dist
), fin AS (
  SELECT
    d.nm_dist AS distrito,
    c.qt_bib,
    c.qt_escolas_lab,
    (
      c.qt_bib - c.qt_escolas_lab
    ) AS diferenca
  FROM distritos AS d
  JOIN cmp AS c
    ON c.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  distrito,
  qt_bib,
  qt_escolas_lab,
  diferenca,
  ROUND(CAST(100.0 * diferenca / NULLIF(AVG(diferenca) OVER (), 0) AS DECIMAL), 2) AS participacao_perc
FROM fin
ORDER BY
  diferenca DESC,
  distrito

rows.original_question: Em Porto Velho/RO, por distrito, entre as escolas que intersectam o distrito e possuem acessibilidade por rampas, qual é a distância média até o centróide do distrito e qual é a razão entre essa distância média e a distância média das escolas sem rampas? Ordene da maior razão para a menor.
rows.original_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT m.cd_mun, m.geometry
  FROM municipio m
  LEFT JOIN unidade_federativa uf ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE m.nm_mun = 'Porto Velho' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'RO'
),
dist AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist, d.nm_dist, d.cd_mun, d.geometry AS geom_dist, ST_Centroid(d.geometry) AS centroide
  FROM distrito d
  LEFT JOIN muni ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
esc AS (
  SELECT e.cd_entidade, e.cd_mun, e.geometry
  FROM escola e
  LEFT JOIN muni ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
agg AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    AVG(ST_Distance(e.geometry, d.centroide)) FILTER (
      WHERE ST_Intersects(e.geometry, d.geom_dist) AND COALESCE(meb.in_acessibilidade_rampas,0)=1
    ) AS dist_media_rampa_m,
    AVG(ST_Distance(e.geometry, d.centroide)) FILTER (
      WHERE ST_Intersects(e.geometry, d.geom_dist) AND COALESCE(meb.in_acessibilidade_rampas,0)=0
    ) AS dist_media_sem_rampa_m
  FROM dist d
  LEFT JOIN esc e ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  LEFT JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  WHERE ST_Within(d.geom_dist, (SELECT geometry FROM muni))
  GROUP BY d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  ROUND(CAST(a.dist_media_rampa_m AS numeric),2) AS dist_media_rampa_m,
  ROUND(CAST(a.dist_media_sem_rampa_m AS numeric),2) AS dist_media_sem_rampa_m,
  ROUND(CAST(a.dist_media_rampa_m / NULLIF(a.dist_media_sem_rampa_m,0) AS numeric),3) AS razao_rampa_vs_sem
FROM dist d
LEFT JOIN agg a ON a.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
ORDER BY razao_rampa_vs_sem DESC NULLS LAST, distrito;
rows.changed_question: Em Porto Velho/AP, por distrito, dentre as escolas que intersectam o distrito e possuem acessibilidade por sinal sonoro, qual é a soma das distâncias até o centróide do distrito; e dentre as escolas que intersectam o distrito e não possuem sinalização, qual é a maior distância até o centróide? Qual a razão entre a soma e a maior distância? Ordene os resultados da maior razão para a menor.
rows.changed_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT
    m.cd_mun,
    m.geometry
  FROM municipio AS m
  LEFT JOIN unidade_federativa AS uf
    ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE
    m.nm_mun = 'Porto Velho' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'AP'
), dist AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    d.nm_dist,
    d.cd_mun,
    d.geometry AS geom_dist,
    ST_CENTROID(d.geometry) AS centroide
  FROM distrito AS d
  LEFT JOIN muni
    ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), esc AS (
  SELECT
    e.cd_entidade,
    e.cd_mun,
    e.geometry
  FROM escola AS e
  LEFT JOIN muni
    ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), agg AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    SUM(ST_DISTANCE(e.geometry, d.centroide)) FILTER(WHERE
      ST_INTERSECTS(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)
      AND COALESCE(meb.in_acessibilidade_sinal_sonoro, 0) = 1) AS dist_media_rampa_m,
    MAX(ST_DISTANCE(e.geometry, d.centroide)) FILTER(WHERE
      ST_INTERSECTS(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)
      AND COALESCE(meb.in_acessibilidade_sinalizacao, 0) = 0) AS dist_media_sem_rampa_m
  FROM dist AS d
  LEFT JOIN esc AS e
    ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  LEFT JOIN microdados_ed_basica AS meb
    ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  WHERE
    ST_WITHIN(d.geom_dist, (
      SELECT
        geometry
      FROM muni
    ))
  GROUP BY
    d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  ROUND(CAST(a.dist_media_rampa_m AS DECIMAL), 2) AS dist_media_rampa_m,
  ROUND(CAST(a.dist_media_sem_rampa_m AS DECIMAL), 2) AS dist_media_sem_rampa_m,
  ROUND(CAST(a.dist_media_rampa_m / NULLIF(a.dist_media_sem_rampa_m, 0) AS DECIMAL), 3) AS razao_rampa_vs_sem
FROM dist AS d
LEFT JOIN agg AS a
  ON a.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
ORDER BY
  razao_rampa_vs_sem DESC NULLS LAST,
  distrito

rows.original_question: Em Joinville/SC, por distrito, qual é a área (km2) resultante da interseção entre o distrito e a zona de 250 m ao redor das escolas que possuem quadra de esportes? Informe também o percentual dessa área em relação à área do distrito.
rows.original_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT m.cd_mun, m.geometry
  FROM municipio m
  INNER JOIN unidade_federativa uf ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE m.nm_mun = 'Joinville' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'SC'
),
dist AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist, d.nm_dist, d.cd_mun,
         d.geometry AS geom_dist,
         ST_Area(d.geometry::geography)/1e6 AS area_dist_km2
  FROM distrito d
  INNER JOIN muni ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
escolas_buf AS (
  SELECT e.cd_mun,
         ST_Buffer(e.geometry::geography, 250)::geometry AS geom_buf
  FROM escola e
  INNER JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  INNER JOIN muni ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
  WHERE COALESCE(meb.in_quadra_esportes,0) = 1
),
intersec AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist,
         ST_Union(ST_Intersection(d.geom_dist, b.geom_buf)) AS geom_inter
  FROM dist d
  INNER JOIN escolas_buf b ON b.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  WHERE ST_Intersects(d.geom_dist, b.geom_buf)
  GROUP BY d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  ROUND(CAST(ST_Area(i.geom_inter::geography)/1e6 AS numeric),4) AS area_intersec_km2,
  ROUND(CAST(100.0 * ST_Area(i.geom_inter::geography) / NULLIF(d.area_dist_km2*1e6,0) AS numeric),2) AS perc_do_distrito
FROM dist d
INNER JOIN intersec i ON i.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
ORDER BY area_intersec_km2 DESC, distrito;
rows.changed_question: Em Joinville/AM, por distrito, qual é a área (km²) resultante da diferença entre o distrito e a zona de 1 043 m ao redor das escolas que possuem banheiro para PNE? Informe também o percentual dessa área em relação à área total do distrito.
rows.changed_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT
    m.cd_mun,
    m.geometry
  FROM municipio AS m
  INNER JOIN unidade_federativa AS uf
    ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE
    m.nm_mun = 'Joinville' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'AM'
), dist AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    d.nm_dist,
    d.cd_mun,
    d.geometry AS geom_dist,
    ST_AREA(CAST(d.geometry AS GEOGRAPHY)) / 1e6 AS area_dist_km2
  FROM distrito AS d
  INNER JOIN muni
    ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), escolas_buf AS (
  SELECT
    e.cd_mun,
    CAST(ST_BUFFER(CAST(e.geometry AS GEOGRAPHY), 1043) AS GEOMETRY) AS geom_buf
  FROM escola AS e
  INNER JOIN microdados_ed_basica AS meb
    ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  INNER JOIN muni
    ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
  WHERE
    COALESCE(meb.in_banheiro_pne, 0) = 1
), intersec AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    ST_UNION(ST_DIFFERENCE(d.geom_dist, b.geom_buf)) AS geom_inter
  FROM dist AS d
  INNER JOIN escolas_buf AS b
    ON b.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  WHERE
    ST_INTERSECTS(d.geom_dist, b.geom_buf)
  GROUP BY
    d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  ROUND(CAST(ST_AREA(CAST(i.geom_inter AS GEOGRAPHY)) / 1e6 AS DECIMAL), 4) AS area_intersec_km2,
  ROUND(
    CAST(100.0 * ST_AREA(CAST(i.geom_inter AS GEOGRAPHY)) / NULLIF(d.area_dist_km2 * 1e6, 0) AS DECIMAL),
    2
  ) AS perc_do_distrito
FROM dist AS d
INNER JOIN intersec AS i
  ON i.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
ORDER BY
  area_intersec_km2 DESC,
  distrito

rows.original_question: Em Contagem/MG, por distrito, entre as escolas dentro do distrito, qual o percentual das que estão até 200 m da borda do distrito e possuem laboratório de ciências e refeitório? Informe também a distância média até a borda.
rows.original_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT m.cd_mun, m.geometry
  FROM municipio m
  LEFT JOIN unidade_federativa uf ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE m.nm_mun = 'Contagem' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'MG'
),
dist AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist, d.nm_dist, d.cd_mun,
         d.geometry AS geom_dist,
         ST_Buffer(ST_Boundary(d.geometry)::geography, 200)::geometry AS faixa_200m
  FROM distrito d
  LEFT JOIN muni ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
esc AS (
  SELECT e.cd_entidade, e.cd_mun, e.geometry
  FROM escola e
  LEFT JOIN muni ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
agg AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ST_Within(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)) AS tot_dentro,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (
      WHERE ST_Within(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)
        AND ST_Intersects(e.geometry, d.faixa_200m)
        AND COALESCE(meb.in_laboratorio_ciencias,0)=1
        AND COALESCE(meb.in_refeitorio,0)=1
    ) AS tot_criterio,
    AVG(ST_Distance(e.geometry, ST_Boundary(d.geom_dist))) FILTER (
      WHERE ST_Within(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)
        AND ST_Intersects(e.geometry, d.faixa_200m)
        AND COALESCE(meb.in_laboratorio_ciencias,0)=1
        AND COALESCE(meb.in_refeitorio,0)=1
    ) AS dist_media_borda_m
  FROM dist d
  LEFT JOIN esc e ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  LEFT JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  GROUP BY d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  ROUND(CAST(100.0 * COALESCE(a.tot_criterio,0) / NULLIF(a.tot_dentro,0) AS numeric),2) AS perc_criterio,
  ROUND(CAST(a.dist_media_borda_m AS numeric),2) AS distancia_media_borda_m
FROM dist d
LEFT JOIN agg a ON a.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
ORDER BY perc_criterio DESC NULLS LAST, distancia_media_borda_m ASC NULLS LAST, distrito;
rows.changed_question: Em Contagem/AL, por distrito, entre as escolas dentro do distrito, qual o percentual das que estão até 4 378 m da borda do distrito e possuem banheiro para funcionários e pátio descoberto? Informe também a menor distância até a borda (considerando apenas as escolas que têm área de plantio e laboratório de informática).
rows.changed_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT
    m.cd_mun,
    m.geometry
  FROM municipio AS m
  LEFT JOIN unidade_federativa AS uf
    ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE
    m.nm_mun = 'Contagem' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'AL'
), dist AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    d.nm_dist,
    d.cd_mun,
    d.geometry AS geom_dist,
    CAST(ST_BUFFER(CAST(ST_BOUNDARY(d.geometry) AS GEOGRAPHY), 4378) AS GEOMETRY) AS faixa_200m
  FROM distrito AS d
  LEFT JOIN muni
    ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), esc AS (
  SELECT
    e.cd_entidade,
    e.cd_mun,
    e.geometry
  FROM escola AS e
  LEFT JOIN muni
    ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), agg AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE
      ST_WITHIN(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)) AS tot_dentro,
    COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE
      ST_WITHIN(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)
      AND ST_INTERSECTS(e.geometry, d.faixa_200m)
      AND COALESCE(meb.in_banheiro_funcionarios, 0) = 1
      AND COALESCE(meb.in_patio_descoberto, 0) = 1) AS tot_criterio,
    MIN(ST_DISTANCE(e.geometry, ST_BOUNDARY(d.geom_dist))) FILTER(WHERE
      ST_WITHIN(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)
      AND ST_INTERSECTS(e.geometry, d.faixa_200m)
      AND COALESCE(meb.in_area_plantio, 0) = 1
      AND COALESCE(meb.in_laboratorio_informatica, 0) = 1) AS dist_media_borda_m
  FROM dist AS d
  LEFT JOIN esc AS e
    ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  LEFT JOIN microdados_ed_basica AS meb
    ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  GROUP BY
    d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  ROUND(CAST(100.0 * COALESCE(a.tot_criterio, 0) / NULLIF(a.tot_dentro, 0) AS DECIMAL), 2) AS perc_criterio,
  ROUND(CAST(a.dist_media_borda_m AS DECIMAL), 2) AS distancia_media_borda_m
FROM dist AS d
LEFT JOIN agg AS a
  ON a.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
ORDER BY
  perc_criterio DESC NULLS LAST,
  distancia_media_borda_m ASC,
  distrito

rows.original_question: Em Boa Vista/RR, por distrito, quantas escolas dentro do distrito têm parque infantil e ficam a até 500 m de alguma biblioteca também dentro do mesmo distrito, considerando o buffer de 500 m ao redor de cada escola?
rows.original_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT m.cd_mun
  FROM municipio m
  RIGHT JOIN unidade_federativa uf ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE m.nm_mun = 'Boa Vista' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'RR'
),
distritos AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist, d.nm_dist, d.cd_mun, d.geometry AS geom_dist
  FROM distrito d
  RIGHT JOIN muni ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
esc_buf AS (
  SELECT e.cd_entidade, e.cd_mun,
         ST_Buffer(e.geometry::geography, 500)::geometry AS buf500,
         e.geometry
  FROM escola e
  RIGHT JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  RIGHT JOIN muni ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
  WHERE COALESCE(meb.in_parque_infantil,0)=1
),
cont AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (
      WHERE ST_Within(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)
        AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1 FROM biblioteca b
          WHERE b.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
            AND ST_Within(b.geometry, d.geom_dist)
            AND ST_Intersects(e.buf500, b.geometry)
        )
    ) AS qt_escolas_criterio
  FROM distritos d
  RIGHT JOIN esc_buf e ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  GROUP BY d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  COALESCE(c.qt_escolas_criterio,0) AS qt_escolas
FROM distritos d
RIGHT JOIN cont c ON c.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
ORDER BY qt_escolas DESC, distrito;
rows.changed_question: Em Boa Vista/GO, por distrito, quantas escolas dentro do distrito têm laboratório de ciências e ficam a até 1118 m de alguma biblioteca também dentro do mesmo distrito, considerando o buffer de 1118 m ao redor de cada escola?
rows.changed_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT
    m.cd_mun
  FROM municipio AS m
  RIGHT JOIN unidade_federativa AS uf
    ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE
    m.nm_mun = 'Boa Vista' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'GO'
), distritos AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    d.nm_dist,
    d.cd_mun,
    d.geometry AS geom_dist
  FROM distrito AS d
  RIGHT JOIN muni
    ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), esc_buf AS (
  SELECT
    e.cd_entidade,
    e.cd_mun,
    CAST(ST_BUFFER(CAST(e.geometry AS GEOGRAPHY), 1118) AS GEOMETRY) AS buf500,
    e.geometry
  FROM escola AS e
  RIGHT JOIN microdados_ed_basica AS meb
    ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  RIGHT JOIN muni
    ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
  WHERE
    COALESCE(meb.in_laboratorio_ciencias, 0) = 1
), cont AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE
      ST_WITHIN(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)
      AND EXISTS(
        SELECT
          1
        FROM biblioteca AS b
        WHERE
          b.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
          AND ST_WITHIN(b.geometry, d.geom_dist)
          AND ST_INTERSECTS(e.buf500, b.geometry)
      )) AS qt_escolas_criterio
  FROM distritos AS d
  RIGHT JOIN esc_buf AS e
    ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  GROUP BY
    d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  COALESCE(c.qt_escolas_criterio, 0) AS qt_escolas
FROM distritos AS d
RIGHT JOIN cont AS c
  ON c.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
ORDER BY
  qt_escolas DESC,
  distrito

rows.original_question: Em Caxias do Sul/RS, por distrito, entre as escolas a até 800 m de um CRAS (usando um buffer de 800 m no CRAS), qual escola tem a maior razão de computadores por matrícula do ensino básico? Mostre também a distância dessa escola até o centróide do distrito.
rows.original_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT m.cd_mun
  FROM municipio m
  JOIN unidade_federativa uf ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE m.nm_mun = 'Caxias do Sul' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'RS'
),
dist AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist, d.nm_dist, d.cd_mun,
         d.geometry AS geom_dist, ST_Centroid(d.geometry) AS centroide
  FROM distrito d
  JOIN muni ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
cras_buf AS (
  SELECT c.cd_mun, ST_Buffer(c.geometry::geography, 800)::geometry AS buf800
  FROM cras c
  JOIN muni ON c.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
esc_ratio AS (
  SELECT
    e.cd_entidade, e.cd_mun, e.geometry,
    (COALESCE(meb.qt_desktop_aluno,0) + COALESCE(meb.qt_comp_portatil_aluno,0) + COALESCE(meb.qt_tablet_aluno,0))
      / NULLIF( (COALESCE(meb.qt_mat_bas,0)), 0 )::numeric AS ratio_comp_por_matricula
  FROM escola e
  JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  JOIN muni ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
cand AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist, e.cd_entidade, e.geometry, e.ratio_comp_por_matricula
  FROM dist d
  JOIN esc_ratio e ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  JOIN cras_buf cb ON cb.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  WHERE ST_Within(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)
    AND ST_Intersects(e.geometry, cb.buf800)
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT
    cd_dist, cd_entidade, ratio_comp_por_matricula,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cd_dist ORDER BY ratio_comp_por_matricula DESC NULLS LAST) AS rn
  FROM cand
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  es.nm_entidade AS escola_top,
  ROUND(CAST(r.ratio_comp_por_matricula AS numeric),4) AS ratio_comp_por_matricula,
  ROUND(CAST(ST_Distance(es.geometry, d.centroide) AS numeric),2) AS dist_ate_centroide_m
FROM dist d
JOIN ranked r ON r.cd_dist = d.cd_dist AND r.rn = 1
JOIN escola es ON es.cd_entidade = r.cd_entidade
ORDER BY ratio_comp_por_matricula DESC NULLS LAST, distrito;
rows.changed_question: Em Caxias do Sul/DF, por distrito, considerando apenas as escolas que estejam dentro de 1261 m de um CRAS (buffer de 1261 m), qual escola apresenta a maior razão de equipamentos (TV, equipamentos multimídia e computadores desktop) por matrícula do ensino médio? Mostre também a distância dessa escola até o centróide do distrito.
rows.changed_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT
    m.cd_mun
  FROM municipio AS m
  JOIN unidade_federativa AS uf
    ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE
    m.nm_mun = 'Caxias do Sul' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'DF'
), dist AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    d.nm_dist,
    d.cd_mun,
    d.geometry AS geom_dist,
    ST_CENTROID(d.geometry) AS centroide
  FROM distrito AS d
  JOIN muni
    ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), cras_buf AS (
  SELECT
    c.cd_mun,
    CAST(ST_BUFFER(CAST(c.geometry AS GEOGRAPHY), 1261) AS GEOMETRY) AS buf800
  FROM cras AS c
  JOIN muni
    ON c.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), esc_ratio AS (
  SELECT
    e.cd_entidade,
    e.cd_mun,
    e.geometry,
    (
      COALESCE(meb.qt_equip_tv, 0) + COALESCE(meb.qt_equip_multimidia, 0) + COALESCE(meb.qt_desktop_aluno, 0)
    ) / CAST(NULLIF((
      COALESCE(meb.qt_mat_med, 0)
    ), 0) AS DECIMAL) AS ratio_comp_por_matricula
  FROM escola AS e
  JOIN microdados_ed_basica AS meb
    ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  JOIN muni
    ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), cand AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    e.cd_entidade,
    e.geometry,
    e.ratio_comp_por_matricula
  FROM dist AS d
  JOIN esc_ratio AS e
    ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  JOIN cras_buf AS cb
    ON cb.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  WHERE
    ST_WITHIN(e.geometry, d.geom_dist) AND ST_INTERSECTS(e.geometry, cb.buf800)
), ranked AS (
  SELECT
    cd_dist,
    cd_entidade,
    ratio_comp_por_matricula,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cd_dist ORDER BY ratio_comp_por_matricula DESC NULLS LAST) AS rn
  FROM cand
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  es.nm_entidade AS escola_top,
  ROUND(CAST(r.ratio_comp_por_matricula AS DECIMAL), 4) AS ratio_comp_por_matricula,
  ROUND(CAST(ST_DISTANCE(es.geometry, d.centroide) AS DECIMAL), 2) AS dist_ate_centroide_m
FROM dist AS d
JOIN ranked AS r
  ON r.cd_dist = d.cd_dist AND r.rn = 1
JOIN escola AS es
  ON es.cd_entidade = r.cd_entidade
ORDER BY
  ratio_comp_por_matricula DESC NULLS LAST,
  distrito

rows.original_question: Em Feira de Santana/BA, por distrito, compare a área (km²) coberta pela união dos buffers de 300 m ao redor das escolas com parque infantil versus a área coberta pelos buffers de 300 m ao redor das escolas sem parque infantil; traga também a participação percentual de cada distrito no total da diferença do município.
rows.original_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT m.cd_mun, m.geometry
  FROM municipio m
  FULL OUTER JOIN unidade_federativa uf ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE m.nm_mun = 'Feira de Santana' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'BA'
),
dist AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist, d.nm_dist, d.cd_mun, d.geometry AS geom_dist
  FROM distrito d
  FULL OUTER JOIN muni ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
buf_com_parque AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist,
         ST_Union(ST_Buffer(e.geometry::geography, 300)::geometry) AS geom_union
  FROM dist d
  JOIN escola e ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  WHERE ST_Within(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)
    AND COALESCE(meb.in_parque_infantil,0)=1
  GROUP BY d.cd_dist
),
buf_sem_parque AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist,
         ST_Union(ST_Buffer(e.geometry::geography, 300)::geometry) AS geom_union
  FROM dist d
  JOIN escola e ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  WHERE ST_Within(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)
    AND COALESCE(meb.in_parque_infantil,0)=0
  GROUP BY d.cd_dist
),
cmp AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(cp.cd_dist, sp.cd_dist) AS cd_dist,
    COALESCE(cp.geom_union, ST_GeomFromText('POLYGON EMPTY', 4674)) AS geom_com,
    COALESCE(sp.geom_union, ST_GeomFromText('POLYGON EMPTY', 4674)) AS geom_sem
  FROM buf_com_parque cp
  FULL OUTER JOIN buf_sem_parque sp ON sp.cd_dist = cp.cd_dist
),
areas AS (
  SELECT
    d.nm_dist AS distrito,
    ST_Area(ST_Intersection(d.geom_dist, c.geom_com)::geography)/1e6 AS area_com_km2,
    ST_Area(ST_Intersection(d.geom_dist, c.geom_sem)::geography)/1e6 AS area_sem_km2,
    (ST_Area(ST_Intersection(d.geom_dist, c.geom_com)::geography)
     - ST_Area(ST_Intersection(d.geom_dist, c.geom_sem)::geography))/1e6 AS diferenca_km2
  FROM dist d
  FULL OUTER JOIN cmp c ON c.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  distrito,
  ROUND(CAST(area_com_km2 AS numeric),4) AS area_com_parque_km2,
  ROUND(CAST(area_sem_km2 AS numeric),4) AS area_sem_parque_km2,
  ROUND(CAST(diferenca_km2 AS numeric),4) AS diferenca_km2,
  ROUND(CAST(100.0 * diferenca_km2 / NULLIF(SUM(diferenca_km2) OVER (),0) AS numeric),2) AS participacao_perc
FROM areas
ORDER BY diferenca_km2 DESC NULLS LAST, distrito;
rows.changed_question: Em Feira de Santana/MG, por distrito, compare a área (km²) obtida pela união da geometria do distrito com os buffers de 211 m ao redor das escolas que possuem sala de repouso do aluno versus a área obtida pela união da geometria do distrito com os buffers de 211 m ao redor das escolas que não possuem laboratório de ciências; calcule também a participação percentual de cada distrito em relação à menor diferença entre essas duas áreas encontrada no município.
rows.changed_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT
    m.cd_mun,
    m.geometry
  FROM municipio AS m
  FULL OUTER JOIN unidade_federativa AS uf
    ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE
    m.nm_mun = 'Feira de Santana' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'MG'
), dist AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    d.nm_dist,
    d.cd_mun,
    d.geometry AS geom_dist
  FROM distrito AS d
  FULL OUTER JOIN muni
    ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), buf_com_parque AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    ST_UNION(CAST(ST_BUFFER(CAST(e.geometry AS GEOGRAPHY), 211) AS GEOMETRY)) AS geom_union
  FROM dist AS d
  JOIN escola AS e
    ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  JOIN microdados_ed_basica AS meb
    ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  WHERE
    ST_WITHIN(e.geometry, d.geom_dist) AND COALESCE(meb.in_sala_repouso_aluno, 0) = 1
  GROUP BY
    d.cd_dist
), buf_sem_parque AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    ST_UNION(CAST(ST_BUFFER(CAST(e.geometry AS GEOGRAPHY), 211) AS GEOMETRY)) AS geom_union
  FROM dist AS d
  JOIN escola AS e
    ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  JOIN microdados_ed_basica AS meb
    ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  WHERE
    ST_WITHIN(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)
    AND COALESCE(meb.in_laboratorio_ciencias, 0) = 0
  GROUP BY
    d.cd_dist
), cmp AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(cp.cd_dist, sp.cd_dist) AS cd_dist,
    COALESCE(cp.geom_union, ST_GEOMFROMTEXT('POLYGON EMPTY', 4674)) AS geom_com,
    COALESCE(sp.geom_union, ST_GEOMFROMTEXT('POLYGON EMPTY', 4674)) AS geom_sem
  FROM buf_com_parque AS cp
  FULL OUTER JOIN buf_sem_parque AS sp
    ON sp.cd_dist = cp.cd_dist
), areas AS (
  SELECT
    d.nm_dist AS distrito,
    ST_AREA(CAST(ST_UNION(d.geom_dist, c.geom_com) AS GEOGRAPHY)) / 1e6 AS area_com_km2,
    ST_AREA(CAST(ST_UNION(d.geom_dist, c.geom_sem) AS GEOGRAPHY)) / 1e6 AS area_sem_km2,
    (
      ST_AREA(CAST(ST_DIFFERENCE(d.geom_dist, c.geom_com) AS GEOGRAPHY)) - ST_AREA(CAST(ST_DIFFERENCE(d.geom_dist, c.geom_sem) AS GEOGRAPHY))
    ) / 1e6 AS diferenca_km2
  FROM dist AS d
  FULL OUTER JOIN cmp AS c
    ON c.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  distrito,
  ROUND(CAST(area_com_km2 AS DECIMAL), 4) AS area_com_parque_km2,
  ROUND(CAST(area_sem_km2 AS DECIMAL), 4) AS area_sem_parque_km2,
  ROUND(CAST(diferenca_km2 AS DECIMAL), 4) AS diferenca_km2,
  ROUND(CAST(100.0 * diferenca_km2 / NULLIF(MIN(diferenca_km2) OVER (), 0) AS DECIMAL), 2) AS participacao_perc
FROM areas
ORDER BY
  diferenca_km2 DESC NULLS LAST,
  distrito

changed_components.original: round(cast(100.0 * diferenca_km2 / nullif(sum(diferenca_km2) over (), 0) as decimal), 2) as participacao_perc
changed_components.changed: round(cast(100.0 * diferenca_km2 / nullif(min(diferenca_km2) over (), 0) as decimal), 2) as participacao_perc

rows.original_question: Em Niterói/RJ, por distrito, qual o percentual de escolas (dentro do distrito) que estão até 400 m de alguma biblioteca também no mesmo distrito e possuem internet e banda larga? Traga também a distância média até a biblioteca mais próxima.
rows.original_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT m.cd_mun, m.geometry
  FROM municipio m
  JOIN unidade_federativa uf ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE m.nm_mun = 'Niterói' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'RJ'
),
dist AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist, d.nm_dist, d.cd_mun, d.geometry AS geom_dist
  FROM distrito d
  JOIN muni ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
esc AS (
  SELECT e.cd_entidade, e.cd_mun, e.geometry
  FROM escola e
  JOIN muni ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
medidas AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ST_Within(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)) AS tot_dentro,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (
      WHERE ST_Within(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)
        AND COALESCE(meb.in_internet,0)=1
        AND COALESCE(meb.in_banda_larga,0)=1
        AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
          FROM biblioteca b
          WHERE b.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
            AND ST_Within(b.geometry, d.geom_dist)
            AND ST_DWithin(e.geometry::geography, b.geometry::geography, 400)
        )
    ) AS tot_criterio,
    AVG((
      SELECT MIN(ST_Distance(e.geometry::geography, b2.geometry::geography))
      FROM biblioteca b2
      WHERE b2.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
        AND ST_Within(b2.geometry, d.geom_dist)
    )) FILTER (WHERE ST_Within(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)) AS dist_media_bib_m
  FROM dist d
  JOIN esc e ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  GROUP BY d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  ROUND(CAST(100.0 * COALESCE(m.tot_criterio,0) / NULLIF(m.tot_dentro,0) AS numeric),2) AS perc_escolas_ate400m_bib_internet_bl,
  ROUND(CAST(m.dist_media_bib_m AS numeric),2) AS distancia_media_biblioteca_m
FROM dist d
JOIN medidas m ON m.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
ORDER BY perc_escolas_ate400m_bib_internet_bl DESC NULLS LAST, distancia_media_biblioteca_m ASC NULLS LAST, distrito;
rows.changed_question: Em Niterói/RN, por distrito, qual o percentual de escolas (dentro do distrito) que estão até 213 m de alguma biblioteca também no mesmo distrito e possuem internet e banda larga? Traga também a distância média até a biblioteca mais próxima.
rows.changed_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT
    m.cd_mun,
    m.geometry
  FROM municipio AS m
  JOIN unidade_federativa AS uf
    ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE
    m.nm_mun = 'Niterói' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'RN'
), dist AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    d.nm_dist,
    d.cd_mun,
    d.geometry AS geom_dist
  FROM distrito AS d
  JOIN muni
    ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), esc AS (
  SELECT
    e.cd_entidade,
    e.cd_mun,
    e.geometry
  FROM escola AS e
  JOIN muni
    ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), medidas AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE
      ST_WITHIN(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)) AS tot_dentro,
    COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE
      ST_WITHIN(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)
      AND COALESCE(meb.in_banda_larga, 0) = 1
      AND COALESCE(meb.in_internet, 0) = 1
      AND EXISTS(
        SELECT
          1
        FROM biblioteca AS b
        WHERE
          b.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
          AND ST_WITHIN(b.geometry, d.geom_dist)
          AND ST_DWITHIN(CAST(e.geometry AS GEOGRAPHY), CAST(b.geometry AS GEOGRAPHY), 213)
      )) AS tot_criterio,
    SUM(
      (
        SELECT
          MIN(ST_DISTANCE(CAST(e.geometry AS GEOGRAPHY), CAST(b2.geometry AS GEOGRAPHY)))
        FROM biblioteca AS b2
        WHERE
          b2.cd_mun = d.cd_mun AND ST_WITHIN(b2.geometry, d.geom_dist)
      )
    ) FILTER(WHERE
      ST_WITHIN(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)) AS dist_media_bib_m
  FROM dist AS d
  JOIN esc AS e
    ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  JOIN microdados_ed_basica AS meb
    ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  GROUP BY
    d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  ROUND(CAST(100.0 * COALESCE(m.tot_criterio, 0) / NULLIF(m.tot_dentro, 0) AS DECIMAL), 2) AS perc_escolas_ate400m_bib_internet_bl,
  ROUND(CAST(m.dist_media_bib_m AS DECIMAL), 2) AS distancia_media_biblioteca_m
FROM dist AS d
JOIN medidas AS m
  ON m.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
ORDER BY
  perc_escolas_ate400m_bib_internet_bl DESC NULLS LAST,
  distancia_media_biblioteca_m ASC,
  distrito

rows.original_question: Em Maringá/PR, por distrito, entre as escolas dentro do distrito e com período noturno, qual a proporção das que ficam até 600 m de um CRAS do mesmo distrito e até 150 m da borda do distrito? Traga também a distância média até o centróide do distrito para esse grupo.
rows.original_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT m.cd_mun, m.geometry
  FROM municipio m
  LEFT JOIN unidade_federativa uf ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE m.nm_mun = 'Maringá' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'PR'
),
dist AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist, d.nm_dist, d.cd_mun,
         d.geometry AS geom_dist,
         ST_Centroid(d.geometry) AS centroide
  FROM distrito d
  LEFT JOIN muni ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
esc AS (
  SELECT e.cd_entidade, e.cd_mun, e.geometry
  FROM escola e
  LEFT JOIN muni ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
agg AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (
      WHERE ST_Within(e.geometry, d.geom_dist) AND COALESCE(meb.in_noturno,0)=1
    ) AS tot_noturno_dentro,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (
      WHERE ST_Within(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)
        AND COALESCE(meb.in_noturno,0)=1
        AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1 FROM cras c
          WHERE c.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
            AND ST_Within(c.geometry, d.geom_dist)
            AND ST_DWithin(e.geometry::geography, c.geometry::geography, 600)
        )
        AND ST_DWithin(e.geometry::geography, ST_Boundary(d.geom_dist)::geography, 150)
    ) AS tot_criterio,
    AVG(ST_Distance(e.geometry::geography, d.centroide::geography)) FILTER (
      WHERE ST_Within(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)
        AND COALESCE(meb.in_noturno,0)=1
        AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1 FROM cras c2
          WHERE c2.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
            AND ST_Within(c2.geometry, d.geom_dist)
            AND ST_DWithin(e.geometry::geography, c2.geometry::geography, 600)
        )
        AND ST_DWithin(e.geometry::geography, ST_Boundary(d.geom_dist)::geography, 150)
    ) AS dist_media_centroide_m
  FROM dist d
  LEFT JOIN esc e ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  LEFT JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  GROUP BY d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  ROUND(CAST(100.0 * COALESCE(a.tot_criterio,0) / NULLIF(a.tot_noturno_dentro,0) AS numeric),2) AS perc_noturno_criterio,
  ROUND(CAST(a.dist_media_centroide_m AS numeric),2) AS distancia_media_centroide_m
FROM dist d
LEFT JOIN agg a ON a.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
ORDER BY perc_noturno_criterio DESC NULLS LAST, distancia_media_centroide_m ASC NULLS LAST, distrito;
rows.changed_question: Em Maringá/TO, por distrito, dentre as escolas localizadas no distrito que oferecem creche, qual a proporção das que também oferecem ensino fundamental e que estão a no máximo 1 930 m de um CRAS do mesmo distrito e a no máximo 580 m da borda do distrito? Também informe a soma das distâncias de cada uma dessas escolas até o centróide do distrito.
rows.changed_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT
    m.cd_mun,
    m.geometry
  FROM municipio AS m
  LEFT JOIN unidade_federativa AS uf
    ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE
    m.nm_mun = 'Maringá' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'TO'
), dist AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    d.nm_dist,
    d.cd_mun,
    d.geometry AS geom_dist,
    ST_CENTROID(d.geometry) AS centroide
  FROM distrito AS d
  LEFT JOIN muni
    ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), esc AS (
  SELECT
    e.cd_entidade,
    e.cd_mun,
    e.geometry
  FROM escola AS e
  LEFT JOIN muni
    ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), agg AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE
      ST_WITHIN(e.geometry, d.geom_dist) AND COALESCE(meb.in_inf_cre, 0) = 1) AS tot_noturno_dentro,
    COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE
      ST_WITHIN(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)
      AND COALESCE(meb.in_fund, 0) = 1
      AND EXISTS(
        SELECT
          1
        FROM cras AS c
        WHERE
          c.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
          AND ST_WITHIN(c.geometry, d.geom_dist)
          AND ST_DWITHIN(CAST(e.geometry AS GEOGRAPHY), CAST(c.geometry AS GEOGRAPHY), 1930)
      )
      AND ST_DWITHIN(CAST(e.geometry AS GEOGRAPHY), CAST(ST_BOUNDARY(d.geom_dist) AS GEOGRAPHY), 580)) AS tot_criterio,
    SUM(ST_DISTANCE(CAST(e.geometry AS GEOGRAPHY), CAST(d.centroide AS GEOGRAPHY))) FILTER(WHERE
      ST_WITHIN(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)
      AND COALESCE(meb.in_inf, 0) = 1
      AND EXISTS(
        SELECT
          1
        FROM cras AS c2
        WHERE
          c2.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
          AND ST_WITHIN(c2.geometry, d.geom_dist)
          AND ST_DWITHIN(CAST(e.geometry AS GEOGRAPHY), CAST(c2.geometry AS GEOGRAPHY), 1930)
      )
      AND ST_DWITHIN(CAST(e.geometry AS GEOGRAPHY), CAST(ST_BOUNDARY(d.geom_dist) AS GEOGRAPHY), 580)) AS dist_media_centroide_m
  FROM dist AS d
  LEFT JOIN esc AS e
    ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  LEFT JOIN microdados_ed_basica AS meb
    ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  GROUP BY
    d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  ROUND(
    CAST(100.0 * COALESCE(a.tot_criterio, 0) / NULLIF(a.tot_noturno_dentro, 0) AS DECIMAL),
    2
  ) AS perc_noturno_criterio,
  ROUND(CAST(a.dist_media_centroide_m AS DECIMAL), 2) AS distancia_media_centroide_m
FROM dist AS d
LEFT JOIN agg AS a
  ON a.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
ORDER BY
  perc_noturno_criterio DESC NULLS LAST,
  distancia_media_centroide_m ASC,
  distrito

rows.original_question: Em Juiz de Fora/MG, por distrito, qual é a escola dentro do distrito com maior razão de computadores por matrícula do ensino básico entre as que ficam até 500 m de uma biblioteca do mesmo distrito? Informe também a distância dessa escola até o centróide do distrito.
rows.original_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT m.cd_mun
  FROM municipio m
  RIGHT JOIN unidade_federativa uf ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE m.nm_mun = 'Juiz de Fora' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'MG'
),
dist AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist, d.nm_dist, d.cd_mun,
         d.geometry AS geom_dist,
         ST_Centroid(d.geometry) AS centroide
  FROM distrito d
  RIGHT JOIN muni ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
esc_ratio AS (
  SELECT
    e.cd_entidade, e.cd_mun, e.geometry,
    (COALESCE(meb.qt_desktop_aluno,0) + COALESCE(meb.qt_comp_portatil_aluno,0) + COALESCE(meb.qt_tablet_aluno,0))
      / NULLIF(COALESCE(meb.qt_mat_bas,0),0)::numeric AS ratio_comp_por_matricula
  FROM escola e
  RIGHT JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  RIGHT JOIN muni ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
cand AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist, e.cd_entidade, e.geometry, e.ratio_comp_por_matricula
  FROM dist d
  RIGHT JOIN esc_ratio e ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  WHERE ST_Within(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)
    AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM biblioteca b
      WHERE b.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
        AND ST_Within(b.geometry, d.geom_dist)
        AND ST_DWithin(e.geometry::geography, b.geometry::geography, 500)
    )
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT
    cd_dist, cd_entidade, ratio_comp_por_matricula,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cd_dist ORDER BY ratio_comp_por_matricula DESC NULLS LAST) AS rn
  FROM cand
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  es.nm_entidade AS escola_top,
  ROUND(CAST(r.ratio_comp_por_matricula AS numeric),4) AS ratio_comp_por_matricula,
  ROUND(CAST(ST_Distance(es.geometry::geography, d.centroide::geography) AS numeric),2) AS dist_ate_centroide_m
FROM dist d
RIGHT JOIN ranked r ON r.cd_dist = d.cd_dist AND r.rn = 1
RIGHT JOIN escola es ON es.cd_entidade = r.cd_entidade
ORDER BY ratio_comp_por_matricula DESC NULLS LAST, distrito;
rows.changed_question: Em Juiz de Fora/PI, por distrito, qual é a escola dentro do distrito que possui a maior razão de tablets, equipamentos multimídia e lousas digitais por matrícula do ensino fundamental, considerando apenas as escolas que ficam até 1 154 m de uma biblioteca do mesmo distrito? Informe também a distância dessa escola até o centróide do distrito.
rows.changed_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT
    m.cd_mun
  FROM municipio AS m
  RIGHT JOIN unidade_federativa AS uf
    ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE
    m.nm_mun = 'Juiz de Fora' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'PI'
), dist AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    d.nm_dist,
    d.cd_mun,
    d.geometry AS geom_dist,
    ST_CENTROID(d.geometry) AS centroide
  FROM distrito AS d
  RIGHT JOIN muni
    ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), esc_ratio AS (
  SELECT
    e.cd_entidade,
    e.cd_mun,
    e.geometry,
    (
      COALESCE(meb.qt_tablet_aluno, 0) + COALESCE(meb.qt_equip_multimidia, 0) + COALESCE(meb.qt_equip_lousa_digital, 0)
    ) / CAST(NULLIF(COALESCE(meb.qt_mat_fund, 0), 0) AS DECIMAL) AS ratio_comp_por_matricula
  FROM escola AS e
  RIGHT JOIN microdados_ed_basica AS meb
    ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  RIGHT JOIN muni
    ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), cand AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    e.cd_entidade,
    e.geometry,
    e.ratio_comp_por_matricula
  FROM dist AS d
  RIGHT JOIN esc_ratio AS e
    ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  WHERE
    ST_WITHIN(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)
    AND EXISTS(
      SELECT
        1
      FROM biblioteca AS b
      WHERE
        b.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
        AND ST_WITHIN(b.geometry, d.geom_dist)
        AND ST_DWITHIN(CAST(e.geometry AS GEOGRAPHY), CAST(b.geometry AS GEOGRAPHY), 1154)
    )
), ranked AS (
  SELECT
    cd_dist,
    cd_entidade,
    ratio_comp_por_matricula,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cd_dist ORDER BY ratio_comp_por_matricula DESC NULLS LAST) AS rn
  FROM cand
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  es.nm_entidade AS escola_top,
  ROUND(CAST(r.ratio_comp_por_matricula AS DECIMAL), 4) AS ratio_comp_por_matricula,
  ROUND(
    CAST(ST_DISTANCE(CAST(es.geometry AS GEOGRAPHY), CAST(d.centroide AS GEOGRAPHY)) AS DECIMAL),
    2
  ) AS dist_ate_centroide_m
FROM dist AS d
RIGHT JOIN ranked AS r
  ON r.cd_dist = d.cd_dist AND r.rn = 1
RIGHT JOIN escola AS es
  ON es.cd_entidade = r.cd_entidade
ORDER BY
  ratio_comp_por_matricula DESC NULLS LAST,
  distrito

rows.original_question: Em Blumenau/SC, por distrito, qual a proporção de escolas dentro do distrito que estão simultaneamente até 300 m de um CRAS e até 300 m de uma biblioteca, ambos no mesmo distrito? Traga também a distância média até o centróide do distrito para esse grupo.
rows.original_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT m.cd_mun, m.geometry
  FROM municipio m
  INNER JOIN unidade_federativa uf ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE m.nm_mun = 'Blumenau' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'SC'
),
dist AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist, d.nm_dist, d.cd_mun,
         d.geometry AS geom_dist,
         ST_Centroid(d.geometry) AS centroide
  FROM distrito d
  INNER JOIN muni ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
esc AS (
  SELECT e.cd_entidade, e.cd_mun, e.geometry
  FROM escola e
  INNER JOIN muni ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
agg AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ST_Within(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)) AS tot_dentro,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (
      WHERE ST_Within(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)
        AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1 FROM cras c
          WHERE c.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
            AND ST_Within(c.geometry, d.geom_dist)
            AND ST_DWithin(e.geometry::geography, c.geometry::geography, 300)
        )
        AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1 FROM biblioteca b
          WHERE b.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
            AND ST_Within(b.geometry, d.geom_dist)
            AND ST_DWithin(e.geometry::geography, b.geometry::geography, 300)
        )
    ) AS tot_cras_e_bib_ate300m,
    AVG(ST_Distance(e.geometry::geography, d.centroide::geography)) FILTER (
      WHERE ST_Within(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)
        AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1 FROM cras c2
          WHERE c2.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
            AND ST_Within(c2.geometry, d.geom_dist)
            AND ST_DWithin(e.geometry::geography, c2.geometry::geography, 300)
        )
        AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1 FROM biblioteca b2
          WHERE b2.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
            AND ST_Within(b2.geometry, d.geom_dist)
            AND ST_DWithin(e.geometry::geography, b2.geometry::geography, 300)
        )
    ) AS dist_media_centroide_m
  FROM dist d
  INNER JOIN esc e ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  INNER JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  GROUP BY d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  ROUND(CAST(100.0 * COALESCE(a.tot_cras_e_bib_ate300m,0) / NULLIF(a.tot_dentro,0) AS numeric),2) AS perc_escolas_ambos_ate300m,
  ROUND(CAST(a.dist_media_centroide_m AS numeric),2) AS distancia_media_centroide_m
FROM dist d
INNER JOIN agg a ON a.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
ORDER BY perc_escolas_ambos_ate300m DESC NULLS LAST, distancia_media_centroide_m ASC NULLS LAST, distrito;
rows.changed_question: Em Blumenau/AC, por distrito, qual a proporção de escolas situadas dentro do distrito que estão simultaneamente a até 694 m de um CRAS e a até 694 m de uma biblioteca, ambos localizados no mesmo distrito? Além disso, informe a distância máxima dessas escolas até o centróide do distrito.
rows.changed_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT
    m.cd_mun,
    m.geometry
  FROM municipio AS m
  INNER JOIN unidade_federativa AS uf
    ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE
    m.nm_mun = 'Blumenau' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'AC'
), dist AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    d.nm_dist,
    d.cd_mun,
    d.geometry AS geom_dist,
    ST_CENTROID(d.geometry) AS centroide
  FROM distrito AS d
  INNER JOIN muni
    ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), esc AS (
  SELECT
    e.cd_entidade,
    e.cd_mun,
    e.geometry
  FROM escola AS e
  INNER JOIN muni
    ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), agg AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE
      ST_WITHIN(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)) AS tot_dentro,
    COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE
      ST_WITHIN(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)
      AND EXISTS(
        SELECT
          1
        FROM cras AS c
        WHERE
          c.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
          AND ST_WITHIN(c.geometry, d.geom_dist)
          AND ST_DWITHIN(CAST(e.geometry AS GEOGRAPHY), CAST(c.geometry AS GEOGRAPHY), 694)
      )
      AND EXISTS(
        SELECT
          1
        FROM biblioteca AS b
        WHERE
          b.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
          AND ST_WITHIN(b.geometry, d.geom_dist)
          AND ST_DWITHIN(CAST(e.geometry AS GEOGRAPHY), CAST(b.geometry AS GEOGRAPHY), 694)
      )) AS tot_cras_e_bib_ate300m,
    MAX(ST_DISTANCE(CAST(e.geometry AS GEOGRAPHY), CAST(d.centroide AS GEOGRAPHY))) FILTER(WHERE
      ST_WITHIN(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)
      AND EXISTS(
        SELECT
          1
        FROM cras AS c2
        WHERE
          c2.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
          AND ST_WITHIN(c2.geometry, d.geom_dist)
          AND ST_DWITHIN(CAST(e.geometry AS GEOGRAPHY), CAST(c2.geometry AS GEOGRAPHY), 694)
      )
      AND EXISTS(
        SELECT
          1
        FROM biblioteca AS b2
        WHERE
          b2.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
          AND ST_WITHIN(b2.geometry, d.geom_dist)
          AND ST_DWITHIN(CAST(e.geometry AS GEOGRAPHY), CAST(b2.geometry AS GEOGRAPHY), 694)
      )) AS dist_media_centroide_m
  FROM dist AS d
  INNER JOIN esc AS e
    ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  INNER JOIN microdados_ed_basica AS meb
    ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  GROUP BY
    d.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  ROUND(
    CAST(100.0 * COALESCE(a.tot_cras_e_bib_ate300m, 0) / NULLIF(a.tot_dentro, 0) AS DECIMAL),
    2
  ) AS perc_escolas_ambos_ate300m,
  ROUND(CAST(a.dist_media_centroide_m AS DECIMAL), 2) AS distancia_media_centroide_m
FROM dist AS d
INNER JOIN agg AS a
  ON a.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
ORDER BY
  perc_escolas_ambos_ate300m DESC NULLS LAST,
  distancia_media_centroide_m ASC,
  distrito

rows.original_question: Em Pelotas/RS, por distrito, para as escolas dentro do distrito e com laboratório de informática, compare a distância média até a biblioteca mais próxima com a distância média até o CRAS mais próximo (ambos no mesmo distrito). Traga também a razão (biblioteca ÷ CRAS).
rows.original_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT m.cd_mun
  FROM municipio m
  FULL OUTER JOIN unidade_federativa uf ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE m.nm_mun = 'Pelotas' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'RS'
),
dist AS (
  SELECT d.cd_dist, d.nm_dist, d.cd_mun, d.geometry AS geom_dist
  FROM distrito d
  FULL OUTER JOIN muni ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
),
esc_lab AS (
  SELECT e.cd_entidade, e.cd_mun, e.geometry
  FROM escola e
  FULL OUTER JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  FULL OUTER JOIN muni ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
  WHERE COALESCE(meb.in_laboratorio_informatica,0)=1
),
bib_media AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    AVG((
      SELECT MIN(ST_Distance(e.geometry::geography, b.geometry::geography))
      FROM biblioteca b
      WHERE b.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
        AND ST_Within(b.geometry, d.geom_dist)
        AND ST_DWithin(e.geometry::geography, b.geometry::geography, 2000)
    )) AS dist_media_bib_m
  FROM dist d
  JOIN esc_lab e ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  WHERE ST_Within(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)
  GROUP BY d.cd_dist
),
cras_media AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    AVG((
      SELECT MIN(ST_Distance(e.geometry::geography, c.geometry::geography))
      FROM cras c
      WHERE c.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
        AND ST_Within(c.geometry, d.geom_dist)
        AND ST_DWithin(e.geometry::geography, c.geometry::geography, 2000)
    )) AS dist_media_cras_m
  FROM dist d
  JOIN esc_lab e ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  WHERE ST_Within(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)
  GROUP BY d.cd_dist
),
cmp AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(b.cd_dist, c.cd_dist) AS cd_dist,
    b.dist_media_bib_m,
    c.dist_media_cras_m
  FROM bib_media b
  FULL OUTER JOIN cras_media c ON c.cd_dist = b.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  ROUND(CAST(cmp.dist_media_bib_m AS numeric),2) AS dist_media_biblioteca_m,
  ROUND(CAST(cmp.dist_media_cras_m AS numeric),2) AS dist_media_cras_m,
  ROUND(CAST(cmp.dist_media_bib_m / NULLIF(cmp.dist_media_cras_m,0) AS numeric),3) AS razao_bib_por_cras
FROM dist d
FULL OUTER JOIN cmp ON cmp.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
ORDER BY razao_bib_por_cras DESC NULLS LAST, distrito;
rows.changed_question: Em Pelotas/AC, por distrito, para as escolas que estão dentro do distrito e possuem laboratório de ciências, calcule a soma das distâncias até a biblioteca mais próxima (dentro do mesmo distrito e a no máximo 2 km) e a soma das distâncias até o CRAS mais próximo (mesmas condições); apresente também a razão entre a soma das distâncias à biblioteca e a soma das distâncias ao CRAS.
rows.changed_sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT
    m.cd_mun
  FROM municipio AS m
  FULL OUTER JOIN unidade_federativa AS uf
    ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
  WHERE
    m.nm_mun = 'Pelotas' AND uf.sigla_uf = 'AC'
), dist AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    d.nm_dist,
    d.cd_mun,
    d.geometry AS geom_dist
  FROM distrito AS d
  FULL OUTER JOIN muni
    ON d.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
), esc_lab AS (
  SELECT
    e.cd_entidade,
    e.cd_mun,
    e.geometry
  FROM escola AS e
  FULL OUTER JOIN microdados_ed_basica AS meb
    ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
  FULL OUTER JOIN muni
    ON e.cd_mun = muni.cd_mun
  WHERE
    COALESCE(meb.in_laboratorio_ciencias, 0) = 1
), bib_media AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    SUM(
      (
        SELECT
          MIN(ST_DISTANCE(CAST(e.geometry AS GEOGRAPHY), CAST(b.geometry AS GEOGRAPHY)))
        FROM biblioteca AS b
        WHERE
          b.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
          AND ST_WITHIN(b.geometry, d.geom_dist)
          AND ST_DWITHIN(CAST(e.geometry AS GEOGRAPHY), CAST(b.geometry AS GEOGRAPHY), 2000)
      )
    ) AS dist_media_bib_m
  FROM dist AS d
  JOIN esc_lab AS e
    ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  WHERE
    ST_WITHIN(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)
  GROUP BY
    d.cd_dist
), cras_media AS (
  SELECT
    d.cd_dist,
    SUM(
      (
        SELECT
          MIN(ST_DISTANCE(CAST(e.geometry AS GEOGRAPHY), CAST(c.geometry AS GEOGRAPHY)))
        FROM cras AS c
        WHERE
          c.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
          AND ST_WITHIN(c.geometry, d.geom_dist)
          AND ST_DWITHIN(CAST(e.geometry AS GEOGRAPHY), CAST(c.geometry AS GEOGRAPHY), 2000)
      )
    ) AS dist_media_cras_m
  FROM dist AS d
  JOIN esc_lab AS e
    ON e.cd_mun = d.cd_mun
  WHERE
    ST_WITHIN(e.geometry, d.geom_dist)
  GROUP BY
    d.cd_dist
), cmp AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(b.cd_dist, c.cd_dist) AS cd_dist,
    b.dist_media_bib_m,
    c.dist_media_cras_m
  FROM bib_media AS b
  FULL OUTER JOIN cras_media AS c
    ON c.cd_dist = b.cd_dist
)
SELECT
  d.nm_dist AS distrito,
  ROUND(CAST(cmp.dist_media_bib_m AS DECIMAL), 2) AS dist_media_biblioteca_m,
  ROUND(CAST(cmp.dist_media_cras_m AS DECIMAL), 2) AS dist_media_cras_m,
  ROUND(CAST(cmp.dist_media_bib_m / NULLIF(cmp.dist_media_cras_m, 0) AS DECIMAL), 3) AS razao_bib_por_cras
FROM dist AS d
FULL OUTER JOIN cmp
  ON cmp.cd_dist = d.cd_dist
ORDER BY
  razao_bib_por_cras DESC NULLS LAST,
  distrito

rows.original_question: No bairro “Centro” de Belo Horizonte, quais escolas estão dentro dos limites do município?
rows.original_sql:
SELECT
  e.cd_entidade,
  e.nm_entidade,
  e.nm_bairro,
  mu.nm_mun
FROM escola e
INNER JOIN municipio mu
  ON mu.cd_mun = e.cd_mun
WHERE mu.nm_mun = 'Belo Horizonte'
  AND e.nm_bairro ILIKE 'Centro%'
  AND ST_Intersects(e.geometry, mu.geometry);

rows.original_question: No bairro “Moinhos de Vento” de Porto Alegre, liste as escolas do bairro que ficam no município e também em algum distrito.
rows.original_sql:
SELECT
  e.cd_entidade, e.nm_entidade, e.nm_bairro,
  mu.nm_mun, d.nm_dist
FROM escola e
INNER JOIN municipio mu
  ON mu.cd_mun = e.cd_mun
INNER JOIN distrito d
  ON d.cd_mun = mu.cd_mun
WHERE mu.nm_mun = 'Porto Alegre'
  AND e.nm_bairro ILIKE '%Moinhos de Vento%'
  AND ST_Intersects(e.geometry, mu.geometry)
  AND ST_Within(e.geometry, d.geometry);
rows.changed_question: Liste as escolas cujo bairro termina com “Moinhos de Vento” no município de Porto Alegre e que estejam dentro de algum distrito.

INNER JOIN municipio AS mu
  ON mu.cd_mun = e.cd_mun
INNER JOIN distrito AS d
  ON d.cd_mun = mu.cd_mun
WHERE

  AND e.nm_bairro ILIKE '%Moinhos de Vento'
  AND ST_INTERSECTS(e.geometry, mu.geometry)

rows.original_question: Nos bairros “Savassi” e “Funcionários” de Belo Horizonte, liste as escolas do bairro que pertencem ao município e à respectiva região imediata.
rows.original_sql:
SELECT
  e.cd_entidade, e.nm_entidade, e.nm_bairro,
  mu.nm_mun, rgi.nm_rgi
FROM rg_imediata rgi
INNER JOIN municipio mu
  ON mu.cd_rgi = rgi.cd_rgi
RIGHT JOIN escola e
  ON mu.cd_mun = e.cd_mun
WHERE mu.nm_mun = 'Belo Horizonte'
  AND (e.nm_bairro ILIKE 'Sava%' OR e.nm_bairro ILIKE 'Funcion%')
  AND ST_Intersects(e.geometry, mu.geometry)
  AND ST_Intersects(mu.geometry, rgi.geometry);

INNER JOIN municipio AS mu
  ON mu.cd_rgi = rgi.cd_rgi

  AND ST_INTERSECTS(mu.geometry, rgi.geometry)

  ST_Distance(e.geometry::geography, ST_Boundary(mu.geometry)::geography) AS distancia_borda_m
FROM escola e

INNER JOIN distrito d
  ON d.cd_mun = mu.cd_mun
WHERE mu.nm_mun = 'Rio de Janeiro'
  AND e.nm_bairro ILIKE 'Tijuc%'
  AND ST_Contains(mu.geometry, e.geometry)
  AND ST_Within(e.geometry, d.geometry);

rows.original_question: No bairro “Copacabana” do Rio de Janeiro, mostre as escolas do bairro, a área ao redor de 250 m e, quando houver, o setor censitário associado.
rows.original_sql:
SELECT
  e.cd_entidade, e.nm_entidade, e.nm_bairro,
  mu.nm_mun, s.cd_setor,
  ST_Buffer(e.geometry::geography, 250)::geometry AS area_ao_redor
FROM escola e
INNER JOIN municipio mu
  ON mu.cd_mun = e.cd_mun
LEFT JOIN setor s
  ON s.cd_mun = mu.cd_mun

rows.original_question: Quais são os bairros de Salvador que possuem escolas com biblioteca e que se intersectam com setores censitários, contabilizando o total de escolas por bairro?
rows.original_sql:
SELECT e.nm_bairro, COUNT(e.cd_entidade) AS total_escolas
FROM escola e
INNER JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON e.cd_entidade = meb.cd_entidade
INNER JOIN municipio m ON e.cd_mun = m.cd_mun
INNER JOIN setor s ON s.cd_mun = m.cd_mun
WHERE m.nm_mun = 'Salvador'
  AND meb.in_biblioteca = 1
  AND ST_Intersects(e.geometry, s.geometry)
  AND ST_Within(e.geometry, m.geometry)
GROUP BY e.nm_bairro;
rows.changed_question: Quais são os bairros de Salvador que possuem escolas que **não** têm área de plantio e que se intersectam com setores censitários, contabilizando o total de escolas por bairro?
rows.changed_sql:
SELECT
  e.nm_bairro,
  COUNT(e.cd_entidade) AS total_escolas
FROM escola AS e
INNER JOIN microdados_ed_basica AS meb
  ON e.cd_entidade = meb.cd_entidade
INNER JOIN municipio AS m
  ON e.cd_mun = m.cd_mun
INNER JOIN setor AS s
  ON s.cd_mun = m.cd_mun
WHERE
  m.nm_mun = 'Salvador'
  AND meb.in_area_plantio = 0
  AND ST_INTERSECTS(e.geometry, s.geometry)
  AND ST_WITHIN(e.geometry, m.geometry)
GROUP BY
  e.nm_bairro

rows.original_question: Nos bairros de Fortaleza, quantas escolas com laboratório de informática estão localizadas em áreas que se intersectam com distritos do município?
rows.original_sql:
SELECT e.nm_bairro, COUNT(e.cd_entidade) AS total_lab_informatica
FROM escola e
LEFT JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON e.cd_entidade = meb.cd_entidade
LEFT JOIN municipio m ON e.cd_mun = m.cd_mun
LEFT JOIN distrito d ON d.cd_mun = m.cd_mun
WHERE m.nm_mun = 'Fortaleza'
  AND meb.in_laboratorio_informatica = 1
  AND ST_Intersects(e.geometry, d.geometry)
  AND ST_Within(e.geometry, m.geometry)
GROUP BY e.nm_bairro;
rows.changed_question: Nos bairros de Fortaleza, quantas escolas que não possuem quadra de esportes estão localizadas em áreas que se intersectam com distritos do município?

LEFT JOIN municipio AS m
  ON e.cd_mun = m.cd_mun
LEFT JOIN distrito AS d
  ON d.cd_mun = m.cd_mun
WHERE
  m.nm_mun = 'Fortaleza'

  AND ST_INTERSECTS(e.geometry, d.geometry)
  AND ST_WITHIN(e.geometry, m.geometry)
GROUP BY

rows.original_question: Nos bairros do município de Recife, qual é o número de escolas com quadra esportiva que se intersectam com subdistritos?
rows.original_sql:
SELECT e.nm_bairro, COUNT(e.cd_entidade) AS total_com_quadra
FROM escola e
RIGHT JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON e.cd_entidade = meb.cd_entidade
RIGHT JOIN municipio m ON e.cd_mun = m.cd_mun
RIGHT JOIN subdistrito sd ON sd.cd_mun = m.cd_mun
WHERE m.nm_mun = 'Recife'
  AND meb.in_quadra_esportes = 1
  AND ST_Intersects(e.geometry, sd.geometry)
  AND ST_Within(e.geometry, m.geometry)
GROUP BY e.nm_bairro;

rows.original_question: Quais bairros de Porto Alegre possuem escolas com sala de música que se intersectam com distritos ou setores do município?
rows.original_sql:
SELECT e.nm_bairro, COUNT(e.cd_entidade) AS total_com_sala_musica
FROM escola e
FULL OUTER JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON e.cd_entidade = meb.cd_entidade
FULL OUTER JOIN municipio m ON e.cd_mun = m.cd_mun
FULL OUTER JOIN distrito d ON d.cd_mun = m.cd_mun
FULL OUTER JOIN setor s ON s.cd_mun = m.cd_mun
WHERE m.nm_mun = 'Porto Alegre'
  AND meb.in_sala_musica_coral = 1
  AND (ST_Intersects(e.geometry, d.geometry) OR ST_Intersects(e.geometry, s.geometry))
  AND ST_Within(e.geometry, m.geometry)
GROUP BY e.nm_bairro;
rows.changed_question: Quais bairros de Porto Alegre possuem escolas que não têm banheiro para funcionários e que se intersectam com distritos ou setores do município?
rows.changed_sql:
SELECT
  e.nm_bairro,
  COUNT(e.cd_entidade) AS total_com_sala_musica
FROM escola AS e
FULL OUTER JOIN microdados_ed_basica AS meb
  ON e.cd_entidade = meb.cd_entidade
FULL OUTER JOIN municipio AS m
  ON e.cd_mun = m.cd_mun
FULL OUTER JOIN distrito AS d
  ON d.cd_mun = m.cd_mun
FULL OUTER JOIN setor AS s
  ON s.cd_mun = m.cd_mun
WHERE
  m.nm_mun = 'Porto Alegre'
  AND meb.in_banheiro_funcionarios = 0
  AND (
    ST_INTERSECTS(e.geometry, d.geometry) OR ST_INTERSECTS(e.geometry, s.geometry)
  )
  AND ST_WITHIN(e.geometry, m.geometry)
GROUP BY
  e.nm_bairro

rows.original_question: Em São Paulo (SP), nos bairros cujo nome contém “Jardim”, quantas escolas com sala de leitura estão contidas em setores censitários do município?
rows.original_sql:
SELECT e.nm_bairro, COUNT(DISTINCT e.cd_entidade) AS total_escolas_sala_leitura
FROM escola e
INNER JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
INNER JOIN municipio m ON m.cd_mun = e.cd_mun
INNER JOIN unidade_federativa uf ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
INNER JOIN setor s ON s.cd_mun = m.cd_mun
  AND ST_Contains(s.geometry, e.geometry)
WHERE uf.nm_uf = 'São Paulo'
  AND m.nm_mun = 'São Paulo'
  AND e.nm_bairro ILIKE '%Jardim%'
  AND meb.in_sala_leitura = 1
  AND ST_Within(e.geometry, m.geometry)
GROUP BY e.nm_bairro;

rows.original_question: No Recife (PE), nos bairros cujo nome contém “Boa Vi”, quantas escolas com pátio coberto estão contidas em subdistritos que também se cruzam com setores do município?
rows.original_sql:
SELECT e.nm_bairro, COUNT(DISTINCT e.cd_entidade) AS total_patio_coberto
FROM escola e
RIGHT JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
RIGHT JOIN municipio m ON m.cd_mun = e.cd_mun
RIGHT JOIN unidade_federativa uf ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
RIGHT JOIN subdistrito sd ON sd.cd_mun = m.cd_mun
  AND ST_Contains(sd.geometry, e.geometry)
RIGHT JOIN setor s ON s.cd_mun = m.cd_mun
  AND ST_Intersects(s.geometry, sd.geometry)
WHERE uf.nm_uf = 'Pernambuco'
  AND m.nm_mun = 'Recife'
  AND e.nm_bairro ILIKE 'Boa Vi%'
  AND meb.in_patio_coberto = 1
  AND ST_Within(e.geometry, m.geometry)
GROUP BY e.nm_bairro;

rows.original_question: Em Belo Horizonte (MG), nos bairros cujo nome contém “Santa”, quantas escolas com televisores estão contidas em setores que se encontram dentro dos limites do município?
rows.original_sql:
SELECT e.nm_bairro, COUNT(DISTINCT e.cd_entidade) AS total_com_tv
FROM escola e
JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
JOIN municipio m ON m.cd_mun = e.cd_mun
JOIN unidade_federativa uf ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
JOIN setor s ON s.cd_mun = m.cd_mun
  AND ST_Contains(s.geometry, e.geometry)
WHERE uf.nm_uf = 'Minas Gerais'
  AND m.nm_mun = 'Belo Horizonte'
  AND e.nm_bairro ILIKE 'Santa%'
  AND COALESCE(meb.qt_equip_tv, 0) > 0
  AND ST_Within(e.geometry, m.geometry)
GROUP BY e.nm_bairro;

rows.original_question: Em Porto Alegre (RS), nos bairros cujo nome contém “Petr”, quantas escolas com internet banda larga estão contidas em distritos ou em setores do município?
rows.original_sql:
SELECT e.nm_bairro, COUNT(DISTINCT e.cd_entidade) AS total_banda_larga

FULL OUTER JOIN municipio m ON m.cd_mun = e.cd_mun
FULL OUTER JOIN unidade_federativa uf ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
FULL OUTER JOIN distrito d ON d.cd_mun = m.cd_mun
  AND ST_Contains(d.geometry, e.geometry)
FULL OUTER JOIN setor s ON s.cd_mun = m.cd_mun
  AND ST_Contains(s.geometry, e.geometry)
WHERE uf.nm_uf = 'Rio Grande do Sul'
  AND m.nm_mun = 'Porto Alegre'
  AND e.nm_bairro ILIKE 'Petr%'
  AND meb.in_internet = 1
  AND meb.in_banda_larga = 1
  AND ST_Within(e.geometry, m.geometry)
GROUP BY e.nm_bairro;
rows.changed_question: Em Porto Alegre (RS), nos bairros cujo nome seja exatamente “Petr”, quantas escolas que não possuem scanner nem lousa digital estão contidas em distritos ou setores do município?

rows.original_question: Em Manaus (AM), nos bairros cujo nome contém “Nova”, qual é a distância média das escolas com biblioteca até as bibliotecas municipais?
rows.original_sql:
SELECT e.nm_bairro,
       AVG(ST_Distance(e.geometry::geography, b.geometry::geography)) AS dist_media_m
FROM escola e
INNER JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
INNER JOIN municipio m ON m.cd_mun = e.cd_mun
INNER JOIN unidade_federativa uf ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
INNER JOIN biblioteca b ON b.cd_mun = m.cd_mun
WHERE uf.nm_uf = 'Amazonas'
  AND m.nm_mun = 'Manaus'
  AND e.nm_bairro ILIKE '%Nova%'
  AND meb.in_biblioteca = 1
  AND ST_Within(e.geometry, m.geometry)
  AND ST_Within(b.geometry, m.geometry)
GROUP BY e.nm_bairro;
rows.changed_question: Em Manaus (AM), nos bairros cujo nome termina com “Nova”, qual é a maior distância entre as escolas que **não** possuem sala/estúdio de gravação e as bibliotecas municipais?
rows.changed_sql:
SELECT
  e.nm_bairro,
  MAX(ST_DISTANCE(CAST(e.geometry AS GEOGRAPHY), CAST(b.geometry AS GEOGRAPHY))) AS dist_media_m
FROM escola AS e
INNER JOIN microdados_ed_basica AS meb
  ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
INNER JOIN municipio AS m
  ON m.cd_mun = e.cd_mun
INNER JOIN unidade_federativa AS uf
  ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
INNER JOIN biblioteca AS b
  ON b.cd_mun = m.cd_mun
WHERE
  uf.nm_uf = 'Amazonas'
  AND m.nm_mun = 'Manaus'
  AND e.nm_bairro ILIKE '%Nova'
  AND meb.in_sala_estudio_gravacao = 0
  AND ST_WITHIN(e.geometry, m.geometry)
  AND ST_WITHIN(b.geometry, m.geometry)
GROUP BY
  e.nm_bairro

rows.original_question: Em Recife (PE), nos bairros cujo nome contém “Vila”, qual é a distância média das escolas que têm quadra de esportes até os CREAS situados a até 2.000 m?
rows.original_sql:
SELECT e.nm_bairro,
       AVG(ST_Distance(e.geometry::geography, cr.geometry::geography)) AS dist_media_m
FROM escola e
JOIN microdados_ed_basica meb ON meb.cd_entidade = e.cd_entidade
JOIN municipio m ON m.cd_mun = e.cd_mun
JOIN unidade_federativa uf ON uf.cd_uf = m.cd_uf
JOIN creas cr ON cr.cd_mun = m.cd_mun
WHERE uf.nm_uf = 'Pernambuco'
  AND m.nm_mun = 'Recife'
  AND e.nm_bairro ILIKE '%Vila%'
  AND meb.in_quadra_esportes = 1
  AND ST_Within(e.geometry, m.geometry)
  AND ST_DWithin(e.geometry::geography, cr.geometry::geography, 2000)
GROUP BY e.nm_bairro;
